weekly_summary: Over the past four days, our security landscape has been characterized by 17 total findings, spanning 11 unique CVEs, with no single vulnerability dominating the landscape, as each of the identified CVEs, including CVE-2026-27750, CVE-2026-27749, and others, was observed only once. The affected security domains are diverse, encompassing Containers, Crypto Libraries, Identity and Authentication, OS and Kernel, npm and Node, Supply Chain, and Web Servers. The most active day was March 5, 2026, indicating a recent surge in security incidents, highlighting the need for continued vigilance across these domains.
